caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The man is positioned in front of a microphone, suggesting he might be recording a podcast or participating in an interview. In the first image, he is seen drinking from a red cup, while in the second image, he has set the cup down and appears to be speaking into the microphone. The setting includes framed photographs on the wall, adding a personal touch to the environment. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session.
